nasb.text: He has made known to His people the power of His works, In giving them the heritage of the nations.

esv.text: He has shown his people the power of his works, in giving them the inheritance of the nations.

cnv.text: 他向自己的子民彰顯大能的作為， 把列國賜給他們為業。

ccb.text: 祂向自己的子民彰显大能， 把列国的土地赐给他们。

csbs.text: 他向他的子民宣告自己的大能作为， 把列国的继业赐给他们。
